title: Potter, Michael - Government Chief Digital Officer, Central Digital and Data Office, the Cabinet Office and the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Potter left his role at the Cabinet Office and at the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology in September 2024.  Strategic Advisor, Equal Experts UK Limited  Mr Potter sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Equal Experts UK. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in August 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Expert Advisor, Kohlberg Kravis Roberts & Co. Inc.  Mr Potter sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Kohlberg Kravis Roberts & Co. Inc. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
